response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of progressive fullstack experience with a profile that closely matches the role. His current position at Acme Software explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, TypeScript and Node.js are central to his recent history, and he has demonstrated React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes exposure across multiple senior roles. His authorship of open-source test frameworks and commitment to TDD signal above-average engineering maturity. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright, Kotlin, and Python experience — but given his breadth and rapid context-switching across stacks, these are learnable gaps rather than disqualifiers.
strengths: Current role directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, hitting the hardest-to-find requirement on the JD
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior roles with evidence of architecture ownership
Strong TDD culture and testing discipline — authored open-source test runners and assertion libraries, led industry workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere in the resume despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin and Python are absent from skills and employment history, both listed as required proficiencies
No mention of Vitest or Playwright; testing experience is strong but not with the specified frameworks
